suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align the compiler-worker startup procedure with the actual mission bootstrap paths and ensure the required context reads are consistently achievable before implementation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The misc-followups-1 review for phase-2-followup-let-wildcard-pattern observed that session 15ae7a84-1ebd-48d2-8ad6-78da2f3d599d attempted to read the repo services file and never showed a successful mission.md read before implementation, despite the compiler-worker skill requiring both.
